apps.pageDescription: Explore the comprehensive collection of SMART on FHIR healthcare applications — categorized by function for easy discovery
apps.heroSubtitle: A curated directory of SMART on FHIR applications transforming healthcare through open standards

intro.title: What is the SMART App Gallery?
intro.description: The SMART App Gallery is a centralized directory that connects healthcare apps and users. It offers developers a free, open way to share their SMART on FHIR applications and gives healthcare providers an easy way to discover, evaluate, and try compatible apps. Unlike single-vendor app stores, the gallery is not restricted to any single EHR platform.

clinical-decision-support.title: Clinical Decision Support
clinical-decision-support.description: Tools that assist clinicians with evidence-based risk calculations, diagnostic decision-making, and precision dosing recommendations at the point of care.

ai-analytics.title: AI & Intelligent Analytics
ai-analytics.description: Applications leveraging artificial intelligence and machine learning to analyze health data, automate clinical queries, and provide predictive insights.

patient-engagement.title: Patient Engagement & Health Records
patient-engagement.description: Platforms empowering patients to collect, manage, aggregate, and share their health data across multiple healthcare systems and providers.

pediatrics.title: Pediatric Tools
pediatrics.description: Specialized applications for pediatric care including growth tracking, blood pressure percentile calculations, bilirubin management, and emergency resuscitation.

care-coordination.title: Care Coordination
care-coordination.description: Applications that streamline provider collaboration, specialist referrals, patient handoffs, and cross-organizational health information exchange.

medication-management.title: Medication Management
medication-management.description: Tools for medication reconciliation, adherence monitoring, prescription drug monitoring, and treatment plan management.

data-visualization.title: Data Visualization & Interoperability
data-visualization.description: Applications that present clinical data in innovative visual formats, enable patient education, and bridge interoperability gaps between systems.

clinical-research.title: Clinical Research
clinical-research.description: Applications that connect patients with clinical trials, streamline research data collection, and automate EHR-to-research data transfers.

telehealth-remote-monitoring.title: Telehealth & Remote Monitoring
telehealth-remote-monitoring.description: Applications enabling remote patient monitoring, telemedicine consultations, chronic disease management from home, and real-time health data collection from wearable devices.

population-health.title: Population Health
population-health.description: Analytics platforms for population-level health management, quality metrics tracking, bulk FHIR data processing, and shared payor-provider health data views.

fhir-developer-tools.title: FHIR Tools & Developer Resources
fhir-developer-tools.description: Developer-focused tools for FHIR data exploration, terminology browsing, bulk data testing, patient demographics viewing, and FHIR server management.

covid19-public-health.title: COVID-19 & Public Health
covid19-public-health.description: Applications for COVID-19 vaccination verification, SMART Health Card issuance and validation, testing status tracking, and genomic variant mapping.

appDescriptions.ASCVD Risk Calculator: Estimates a 10-year and/or lifetime cardiovascular risk score and provides guidance on how to potentially reduce risk through lifestyle and medical interventions.
appDescriptions.Cardiac Risk (Reynolds Risk Score): Uses the widely-adopted Reynolds Risk Score to estimate a patient's 10-year risk of heart attack or stroke, with interactive simulation for clinicians to explore risk reduction scenarios.
appDescriptions.Atrial Fibrillation Tool: Offers personalized risk profiles, clinical guidance, and interactive visualization of the benefits and harms of various treatments for atrial fibrillation.
appDescriptions.EBMcalc: The premier source of interactive Evidence-Based Medicine calculators, pre-populating clinical data via FHIR to save clinicians time while promoting evidence-based practice.
appDescriptions.CDS Connect: Pain Management Summary: Presents a comprehensive dashboard of pain-related information including diagnoses, medications, lab results, and assessment scores with visual cues for potential concerns.
appDescriptions.Colchicine CYP3A4/PGP Interaction App: Provides clinical decision support for identifying and managing drug interactions when a patient is prescribed both colchicine and a CYP3A4/PGP inhibitor.
appDescriptions.Risk Benefit: A centralized, searchable database for physicians to discuss risks and benefits of procedures and interventions with patients in an easy-to-understand manner.
appDescriptions.Chest Pain App: Retrieves and displays selected data relevant to a chest pain chief complaint from electronic health records and other clinical systems.
appDescriptions.CRC Prediction Tool: A prediction tool for colorectal cancer detection in symptomatic patients, integrating clinical data for risk assessment.
appDescriptions.Rx Studio: A HIPAA-compliant cloud platform providing clinical decision support for precision dosing using peer-reviewed PK/PD/PGx models.
appDescriptions.DoseMeRx: Integrates directly into EHR workflows to automatically extract patient data and calculate individualized drug doses based on how each patient responds to therapy.
appDescriptions.Healthsuite: Equips users to identify and test chronic cardiac and diabetes risks using multiple algorithms including heart failure mortality prediction and hospital readmission probability.
appDescriptions.AI-Powered Health Chart: A pioneering solution designed to offer physicians an efficient AI-driven way to access, understand, and analyze complex health data.
appDescriptions.AutoMed Query: Enables clinicians to query patient data using natural language, leveraging AI to translate clinical questions into structured FHIR data queries.
appDescriptions.Abstractive Health: A physician AI assistant that helps curate the optimal patient record by intelligently summarizing and organizing clinical information.
appDescriptions.DxPrime: A machine learning-powered analytical tool that provides diagnosis and procedure code suggestions, analyzing data from 3.2 billion patient visits.
appDescriptions.NLP2FHIR: A FHIR-based clinical data normalization pipeline developed at Mayo Clinic, applying NLP to identify clinical conditions from semi-structured discharge summaries.
appDescriptions.Kickcall AI: A HIPAA-compliant AI answering service built for healthcare clinics, ensuring every patient call is answered professionally during off-hours or peak times.
appDescriptions.CHF Predictive Analytics: Helps clinicians identify and assess chronic cardiac risks using predictive analytics models for congestive heart failure patients.
appDescriptions.CommonHealth: Helps patients collect and manage personal health data from 700+ sources including Mayo Clinic and Cleveland Clinic, sharing securely with trusted services.
appDescriptions.MyLinks: An interactive platform for patients to gather, manage, and share their medical information, linking them with physicians, researchers, and caregivers.
appDescriptions.1upHealth: Aggregates patient data from external health systems into one place, presenting demographics, medications, labs, conditions, and history in a unified timeline.
appDescriptions.Fasten Health: An open-source, self-hosted personal medical record aggregator supporting multiple EHR platforms for patient engagement and data visualization.
appDescriptions.OneRecord: Supports multiple FHIR versions (DSTU 2, STU 3, R4) across major EHR platforms for clinical research, population health, and patient engagement.
appDescriptions.PatientCare Portal: A connected healthcare model portal providing data consolidation, FHIR and PHR support, real-time device data collection, and health visualization.
appDescriptions.Carefluence Patient Portal: A comprehensive patient portal providing access to medical records, reports, and imaging studies through FHIR-based interoperability.
appDescriptions.C-Now: Enables providers to access patient records from anywhere using any device, with detailed tabs for Chart Summary, Documents, Vitals, History, and Demographics.
appDescriptions.Flexpa: A Patient Access connectivity layer (API) helping developers build experiences for health plan coverage verification and medical claims data viewing.
appDescriptions.AppScript: Classifies and evaluates 318,000+ digital health apps, enabling clinicians to electronically prescribe apps, devices, and digital content from their EMR workflow.
appDescriptions.Bilirubin App: A demonstration app designed to help clinicians treat newborn hyperbilirubinemia appropriately by visualizing bilirubin levels against treatment thresholds.
appDescriptions.SMART BP Centiles: A full-featured, clinically deployed app that calculates a child's blood pressure percentiles normalized by age, sex, and height.
appDescriptions.BP Centiles (Updated): An updated version of the open-source BP Centiles app with enhanced features and modern FHIR R4 support.
appDescriptions.Growth Chart: Demonstrates a high-performance, concise, minimal-click presentation of a child's growth over time with interactive graphs, data tables, and parent view.
appDescriptions.Growth Chart and Immunizations: Includes WHO growth charts (length, weight, head circumference) for ages 0-2 and CDC growth charts (height, weight) for children 2 years and older.
appDescriptions.Pediatric Growth Chart for iOS: Includes 32 official growth charts from WHO and CDC, optimized for iOS mobile use in pediatric clinical settings.
appDescriptions.Handtevy Hospital: An award-winning rapid resuscitation system for pediatrics and adults, providing weight-based medication dosing and emergency protocols.
appDescriptions.AristaMD: Enables more efficient patient care by connecting providers to specialists via eConsults, improving patient satisfaction and reducing unnecessary referrals.
appDescriptions.Convergent Provider Search: A provider search tool based on your FHIR API, ensuring you only need to update provider data once across all integrated systems.
appDescriptions.Cozeva: Displays patient care opportunities within the EHR as an embedded SMART on FHIR iFrame, allowing clinicians to review and address quality care gaps.
appDescriptions.Current Health: Enables healthcare organizations to personalize and scale home healthcare delivery with a single, flexible remote monitoring and care solution.
appDescriptions.ACT.md: Extends EMRs across the community, removing data silos that prevent addressing social determinants of health for better care coordination.
appDescriptions.HIE InContext: Provides information from participating Health Information Exchanges within the context of a clinician's existing EHR workflow.
appDescriptions.Physician Sign Out: A HIPAA-compliant patient hand-off app for providers that increases the quality of patient hand-off care through innovative, secure software.
appDescriptions.T System SMART App: Provides Emergency Department clinical content and an intuitive workflow, generating readable clinical narratives that export automatically to Epic.
appDescriptions.Doctor Care Portal: Works in conjunction with PatientCare Portal, enabling doctors to review vitals, inspect PHR and family history, and conduct secure messaging.
appDescriptions.Doximity on FHIR: View collaborating providers' contact information, education, and certifications within the EHR, and securely message care teams.
appDescriptions.Fullscript: Facilitates seamless creation and management of treatment plans across dozens of EHRs using SMART on FHIR, compliant with HIPAA, SOC2, and PCI-DSS.
appDescriptions.Meducation RS: Summarizes patients' complex medication regimens in a single page with detailed instructions for 5,000+ medications in patient-friendly language.
appDescriptions.MPR Monitor: Uses an algorithm developed at Boston Children's Hospital to predict poor medication adherence based on the patient's prescription and fill history.
appDescriptions.RxOrbit InWorkflow: Embeds medication lists, alerts, and PDMP information directly into a patient's record within the clinician's EHR or pharmacy system.
appDescriptions.MedTrue: Integrates different medication data sources to assist with medication reconciliation and adherence, producing a verified medication list within the EMR.
appDescriptions.COSRI: Clinical Opioid Summary with Rx Integration — a decision support app using Prescription Drug Monitoring Program (PDMP) data for safer opioid prescribing.
appDescriptions.DMEscripts: Simplifies the durable medical equipment ordering process so patients, providers, and suppliers all get what they need faster and more efficiently.
appDescriptions.Avatachart: Visualizes clinical data in 3D, helping users easily understand health, disease, and surgery information without requiring medical knowledge.
appDescriptions.Lush SMART on FHIR: Demonstrates connecting with multiple EMRs to provide clinical data for a specified patient, running on iOS, Android, and Windows devices.
appDescriptions.Aidbox Forms: Integrates FHIR-based questionnaires into your EHR or patient portal, supporting both practitioner and patient launch contexts.
appDescriptions.Krames On FHIR: Integrates into existing EHR systems and clinical workflows, helping providers print award-winning patient education materials at the point of care.
appDescriptions.SMART Precision Cancer Medicine: Open-source software presenting individual patients within the population-level spectrum of cancer somatic mutations for precision oncology.
appDescriptions.eDocSS: Co-developed with the American College of Surgeons to meet Commission on Cancer Synoptic Operative Report requirements for standardized surgical documentation.
appDescriptions.Clinical Trial Finder: An EHR-launch app that searches for clinical trials matching patient demographics and conditions, with full MIT-licensed open source code.
appDescriptions.Clinical Trials Search: Provides clinical trials matching embedded directly in the EHR, built on a reusable library that operates standalone or within server environments.
appDescriptions.ClinTrial Connector: An EHR-to-EDC connector that transfers 30-70% of trial data, reducing time spent on double data entry in clinical research workflows.
appDescriptions.SMART on FHIR Appointment Scheduler: Allows patients to securely view upcoming appointments, book new ones, and cancel existing ones through FHIR-compliant EHR integration.
appDescriptions.Stone LogiK: A precision medicine tool that predicts success and complication rates for kidney stone treatments based on patient and stone demographics, helping select optimal therapy.
appDescriptions.PE Calculator: Auto-completes the Revised Geneva and PERC rules based on patient information in FHIR to calculate pulmonary embolism risk scores at the point of care.
appDescriptions.YouScript: Reduces costs and saves lives with polypharmacy risk mitigation through real-time, gene-based medication guidance and clinical decision support analytics.
appDescriptions.HMS Library of Evidence: Provides evidence-based decision rules to guide appropriate imaging orders in the context of patient clinical data, reducing unnecessary imaging studies.
appDescriptions.Childhood Obesity Risk: Assists primary care providers and families with identifying the risk of developing childhood obesity in the next 1-3 years using predictive models.
appDescriptions.VisualDx Diagnostic CDS: A diagnostic clinical decision support tool with extensive medical image library, helping clinicians identify conditions through visual pattern recognition.
appDescriptions.HEART Pathway: A validated decision tool that improves health outcomes and reduces unnecessary costs for patients presenting to the ED with chest pain.
appDescriptions.HealthDecision: Provides shared decision-making tools that help patients and clinicians collaborate on treatment choices using evidence-based risk and benefit information.
appDescriptions.AI-Driven Medical Summaries: Empowers medical professionals with AI-driven insights and comprehensive medical summaries to enhance patient care and clinical decision-making.
appDescriptions.HealthConnect AI Cardiovascular Risk: Leverages cutting-edge AI algorithms to evaluate cardiovascular health risks, providing personalized risk assessments and preventive recommendations.
appDescriptions.HealthConnect AI Chat Questionnaires: Engages patients with AI-driven chat-based questionnaires, personalizing responses to collect detailed health feedback and monitor treatment adherence.
appDescriptions.HealthConnect Form Templates: Efficiently collects patient responses using customizable form-based templates, ensuring accurate data capture for clinical documentation.
appDescriptions.HealthConnect AI Care Plan Generator: Uses artificial intelligence to automatically generate personalized patient care plans based on clinical data, conditions, and evidence-based guidelines.
appDescriptions.HealthCheck AI: An AI-powered health assessment tool that analyzes patient data to identify potential health risks and recommend preventive measures.
appDescriptions.b.well Connected Health: Aggregates patient data from connected healthcare facilities, giving patients access to all of their records in one single SMART patient portal.
appDescriptions.PatientShare: A SMART on FHIR clinical data viewer supporting USCDI resources, CMS Post-Acute Care assessments, advance directives, and international patient summaries.
appDescriptions.Guava: Available in 14 languages across web, Android, and iOS, connecting 50,000+ providers with support for glucose monitors, blood pressure monitors, and automatic lab extraction.
appDescriptions.MyFHR: Consolidates entire family medical information from multiple hospital and clinical portals, along with data from connected Apple Health devices.
appDescriptions.Mere Medical: An open-source, offline-first, privacy-focused, self-hostable personal health record web app connecting to multiple patient portals across major EHR platforms.
appDescriptions.CarePassport: A digital health passport enabling patients to securely store, manage, and share their medical records, vaccination status, and health credentials.
appDescriptions.Complete Patient Portal: A comprehensive FHIR-based patient portal allowing clinicians and patients to view all medical records, reports, and imaging studies in one place.
appDescriptions.Growth Chart for Infants: A growth chart web application designed for parents and pediatricians to visualize infant growth data from birth to 36 months including length, weight, and head circumference.
appDescriptions.Hale Health: Connects clinical teams and patients between visits through live video visits, secure messaging, photo and video sharing, and remote care coordination.
appDescriptions.HealthConnect Referral Manager: Streamlines patient referral workflows by automating referral creation, tracking, and communication between primary care and specialist providers.
appDescriptions.Carefluence Open HIE: An open health information exchange platform enabling seamless data sharing across healthcare organizations using FHIR-based interoperability standards.
appDescriptions.NuboHealth: Integrates Salesforce Health Cloud with FHIR-enabled EHR systems for enhanced care coordination, patient engagement, and population health management.
appDescriptions.uPerform for Healthcare: Provides in-application training and performance support for healthcare IT systems, helping clinical staff learn and use EHR systems more effectively.
appDescriptions.Curation Health: Uses AI to automate clinical documentation and hierarchical condition coding, improving risk adjustment accuracy and reducing physician burden.
appDescriptions.Smartlist Platform: A clinical workflow platform that creates smart, dynamic patient lists within the EHR to improve care team coordination and task management.
appDescriptions.Duke PillBox: A patient-centered, skill-based interactive learning tool designed to improve skills for medication management and patient-provider communication.
appDescriptions.RxPrime: Provides smart medication lists and prescription management tools, helping clinicians maintain accurate and up-to-date medication records.
appDescriptions.Surescripts Medication Management: Connects healthcare providers with comprehensive medication history data from pharmacies and PBMs for safer prescribing and medication reconciliation.
appDescriptions.MedActionPlan: Creates personalized, visual medication action plans that help patients understand their medications, dosing schedules, and important safety information.
appDescriptions.Warfarin/NSAID Risk Tool: Assesses bleeding risk for patients on warfarin who are prescribed NSAIDs, providing clinical decision support for safer pain management.
appDescriptions.Drug Education (eDosing): Provides drug education materials and dosing guidance to help patients and clinicians understand medication regimens and potential interactions.
appDescriptions.Meta Care AI: An innovative AI-powered health app designed specifically for seniors, veterans, and individuals seeking personalized health management and wellness guidance.
appDescriptions.MoleCare: A dermatology self-management app for those wishing to take control of their skin health through photo tracking and AI-assisted mole analysis.
appDescriptions.Caren mHealth: Collects real-world health data including data from at-home medical devices, wearables, and patient-reported outcomes for comprehensive remote monitoring.
appDescriptions.Caren RPM: A remote patient monitoring platform that decreases the cost and complexity of remotely monitoring patients between telemedicine and clinic visits.
appDescriptions.Propeller Health: A digital respiratory health management platform connecting inhalers and sensors to provide insights for asthma and COPD patients.
appDescriptions.Visiontree: A patient-reported outcomes collection platform that automates health assessments, questionnaires, and surveys integrated with EHR workflows.
appDescriptions.Rimidi: A chronic disease management platform that aggregates patient data and provides clinical decision support for conditions like diabetes and hypertension.
appDescriptions.Medocity: A virtual care platform enabling remote patient monitoring, care navigation, and digital health management for chronic and post-acute care.
appDescriptions.CLINIA: Provides patient and clinician-facing interfaces to monitor and score rheumatic disease symptoms, supporting shared decision-making in rheumatology care.
appDescriptions.Diabetes Monograph: Displays patient information in a diabetes-specific monograph format, demonstrating the usability and cognitive efficiency of disease-focused data views.
appDescriptions.MazikCare Timeline on FHIR: Presents patient clinical data in an interactive timeline visualization, making it easier to understand the progression of care over time.
appDescriptions.Smart Forms: A reference implementation for SMART App Launch and Structured Data Capture specifications, integrating standardized health check forms into clinical management systems.
appDescriptions.LHC-Forms SDC Questionnaire: Uses LHC-Forms to handle FHIR Questionnaire and QuestionnaireResponse resources and their SDC profiles for standardized clinical data capture.
appDescriptions.PHQ-9 Depression Tracker: Enables clinicians to quickly view and track a patient's depression outcomes from PHQ-9 score history for mental health monitoring.
appDescriptions.seeCOLe: Allows clinicians to see clinical data on lens — providing an augmented view of patient information for enhanced clinical decision-making.
appDescriptions.Diabetes EMR (DBEMR): A diabetes-focused electronic medical record view that consolidates diabetes-related clinical data for streamlined disease management and monitoring.
appDescriptions.ClinView: A clinical data viewer that presents patient information in organized, specialty-specific views for efficient clinical review and documentation.
appDescriptions.HealthConnect AI Medical Summary: Generates AI-powered comprehensive medical summaries from patient records, helping clinicians quickly understand complex patient histories.
appDescriptions.Synoptic Operative Report: A web-based postoperative report tool that maintains compliance and provides correct procedural codes, quality indicators, and immediate sign-out capabilities.
appDescriptions.CDASH on FHIR: Bridges Clinical Data Acquisition Standards Harmonization (CDASH) with FHIR, streamlining clinical research data collection from EHR systems.
appDescriptions.Clinical Pipe: A data pipeline tool that facilitates the extraction and transformation of clinical data from EHR systems for research and analytics purposes.
appDescriptions.NGS Quality Reporting: A FHIR-based web application for next-generation sequencing quality reporting and management in genomic medicine and precision oncology.
appDescriptions.FHIR Data Capture Tool: A developer tool for capturing and validating FHIR resources, helping clinical professionals retrieve, validate, and manage medical datasets on FHIR servers.
appDescriptions.SMART-PopHealth: A population health analytics app enabling payors and providers to share live data views and quality metrics on covered populations side by side.
appDescriptions.SMART Cardiac Risk Population: The SMART Cardiac Risk App re-implemented for population management, using bulk FHIR data to assess cardiovascular risk across patient cohorts.
appDescriptions.Population Health Analytics: Provides population-level health analytics and reporting capabilities using FHIR bulk data for quality improvement and care management programs.
appDescriptions.Care Gaps Dashboard: Identifies and displays quality care gaps across patient populations, helping healthcare organizations track and close gaps in preventive care.
appDescriptions.Bulk Data Analytics: Processes and analyzes FHIR bulk data exports for population health insights, quality reporting, and healthcare operations analytics.
appDescriptions.Health Quality Dashboard: A dashboard for tracking healthcare quality metrics and performance indicators across patient populations using standardized FHIR data.
appDescriptions.PDemo: A simple HTML+JavaScript single page application that queries patients' demographic information from a FHIR server for testing and development purposes.
appDescriptions.Records: A multi-version FHIR data viewer supporting DSTU 1 through R4, enabling developers and clinicians to browse and inspect FHIR resources.
appDescriptions.Shrimp: A FHIR resource browser and testing tool that helps developers explore and validate FHIR server implementations and resource structures.
appDescriptions.FHIR Terminology Browser: Browse and search FHIR terminology resources including code systems, value sets, and concept maps from the National Library of Medicine.
appDescriptions.Bulk Data Client: A reference implementation client for the FHIR Bulk Data Access specification, enabling automated export and download of large FHIR datasets.
appDescriptions.Bulk Data Tester: Tests FHIR servers for compliance with the Bulk Data Access specification, verifying export operations, authentication, and data format correctness.
appDescriptions.OpenHRE: An open health record exchange platform providing FHIR-based tools for health data interoperability, exchange, and integration across systems.
appDescriptions.Patient Data Fetcher: A developer utility for fetching and displaying patient data from FHIR servers, useful for testing FHIR API implementations and debugging.
appDescriptions.FHIR Terminology Server Dashboard: A management dashboard for FHIR terminology servers, providing visibility into code systems, value sets, and terminology service operations.
appDescriptions.Genomics Advisor: A SMART on FHIR application for genomic medicine that helps clinicians interpret and apply genomic data in clinical decision-making.
appDescriptions.LA Wallet: Louisiana's digital driver's license app that also displays SMART Health Card information for verifying proof of COVID-19 vaccination status.
appDescriptions.VizCat SMART Card Verifier: Verifies and displays SMART Health Card information, validating COVID-19 vaccination records and other health credentials.
appDescriptions.Have I Been Tested: A public health app for tracking COVID-19 testing status, helping individuals and organizations verify testing history and results.
appDescriptions.COVID Vaccination QR Scanner: Scans and verifies QR codes from COVID-19 vaccination cards, validating SMART Health Card-encoded vaccination records.
appDescriptions.SMART Health Card Verifier: An official verifier for SMART Health Cards, validating the cryptographic signatures and data integrity of digital health credentials.
appDescriptions.VariantMapper: Maps and visualizes genomic variants from sequencing data, supporting public health surveillance and precision medicine research efforts.

galleryLink.title: Explore the Full Gallery
galleryLink.description: Visit the official SMART Health IT App Gallery for the most up-to-date application listings, try live demos, and discover new SMART on FHIR apps.
